title: euphorbia cuneneana subsp. cuneneana
intro: Euphorbia cuneneana subsp. cuneneana, also known as the Cunene spurge, is a succulent plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique, shrub-like appearance and greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its latex, which has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia cuneneana subsp. cuneneana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by extracting the latex and using it in topical creams or ointments, or by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
